title: Sorting and limiting
prompt_md: Return the `title` of the **top 2** movies by `rating`, highest first.
starter_code: SELECT title FROM movies ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 2;
hints: `ORDER BY rating DESC` sorts from highest to lowest.
`LIMIT 2` keeps only the first 2 rows after sorting.
reference_solution: SELECT title FROM movies ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 2;
